2605.13706.title: Identifying AI Web Scrapers Using Canary Tokens
2605.13706.paper_summary: From pre-training to query-time augmentation, web-scraped data helps to improve the quality and contextual relevancy of content generated by large language models (LLMs). However, large-scale web scraping to feed LLMs can affect site stability and raise legal, privacy, or ethics concerns. If website owners wish to limit LLM-related web scraping on their site, due to these or other concerns, they may turn to scraper access control mechanisms like the Robots Exclusion Protocol. To be most effective, such mechanisms require site owners to first identify the scrapers that they wish to restrict (e.g., via User-Agent strings). Existing mechanisms to identify LLM-related scrapers rely on voluntary disclosure by companies, one-off experiments by researchers, or crowd-sourced reports -- methods that are neither reliable nor scalable. This paper proposes a novel technique for accurately and automatically inferring LLM-related scrapers. We host dynamic websites that serve unique canary tokens to each visiting scraper, then prompt LLMs for information about our sites. If an LLM consistently generates outputs containing tokens unique to a scraper, it provides evidence of exposure to that scraper. Via experiments across 22 production LLM systems, we demonstrate that our approach can reliably identify which scrapers feed which LLM, including several that are not publicly known or disclosed by the companies. Our approach provides a promising avenue for unprivileged third parties to infer which scrapers serve data to which LLMs, potentially enabling better control over unwanted scraping.
2605.13706.paper_summary_zh: 從預訓練到查詢時間增強，網路抓取的數據有助於提高大型語言模型（LLMs）生成內容的質量和上下文相關性。<lb/>然而，大規模的網路抓取以供應 LLMs 可能會影響網站穩定性，並引發法律、隱私或倫理方面的擔憂。<lb/>如果網站擁有者希望因為這些或其他原因限制與 LLM 相關的網路抓取，他們可能會轉向像機器人排除協議這樣的抓取訪問控制機制。<lb/>為了最有效，這些機制需要網站擁有者首先識別他們希望限制的抓取者（例如，通過用戶代理字符串）。<lb/>現有的識別與 LLM 相關的抓取者的機制依賴於公司的自願披露、研究人員的一次性實驗或眾包報告——這些方法既不可靠也不可擴展。<lb/>本文提出了一種新技術，用於準確且自動地推斷與 LLM 相關的抓取者。<lb/>我們托管動態網站，為每個訪問的抓取者提供獨特的金絲雀令牌，然後提示 LLM 獲取有關我們網站的信息。<lb/>如果 LLM 一直生成包含特定於某個抓取者的令牌的輸出，則提供了該抓取者的暴露證據。<lb/>通過在 22 個生產 LLM 系統中的實驗，我們展示了我們的方法可以可靠地識別哪些抓取者供應哪些 LLM，包括幾個未被公司公開或披露的抓取者。<lb/>我們的方法為無特權的第三方推斷哪些抓取者向哪些 LLM 提供數據提供了有希望的途徑，這可能使得對不必要的抓取進行更好的控制成為可能。
2605.13706.author: Steven Seiden et.al.
2605.13706.authors: Steven Seiden, Triss Ren, Caroline Zhang, Taein Kim, Enze Liu, Emily Wenger
